ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "attention_rating" INTEGER /* Attention rating given during the experiment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the participant */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "consent_form_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent form was signed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment condition */,
  "peer_condition" TEXT /* Type of peer condition (e.g., human) */,
  "reg_level" TEXT /* Registration level of the participant (e.g., low, high) */,
  "verb_status" TEXT /* Status of the verb during the experiment */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the experiment (e.g., postTest) */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., cognitive, behavioral) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment condition was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the participant providing the response */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment condition related to the response */,
  "post_reg_mean" REAL /* Mean score of participant responses post-registration */,
  "other_player_reasonable" INTEGER /* Rating for whether other player's behavior was reasonable */,
  "verb_status2" TEXT /* Secondary verb status for the experiment */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was recorded */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Textual responses from the participant */,
  "behavior_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the participant's behavior */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_responses_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES experiment_conditions ("condition_id")
)
